title: Apply building codes and standards to the construction process for Class 10 buildings
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply building codes and standards to the construction process for Class 10 buildings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
